author: Greg / Codex AutoResearch
name: Non-record: Compile-friendly state-space hybrid with attention anchors
blurb: Fixed-step local sign-of-life on the standard scorer path. Layout AASSSASSS with S4D-style state-space blocks, exact attention anchors, and an export policy that keeps ssm.* tensors in float16 while the rest uses the standard int8+zlib roundtrip.
